name: Almond-Streusel Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup flour and 1/2 tsp salt. Cut in 10 tbsp butter and the shortening until mixture resembles coarse meal with a few pea-sized pieces remaining.
2. Sprinkle in 3 to 4 tbsp ice water, a tablespoon at a time, until dough just comes together. Gather into a disk. Wrap and chill for at least 30 minutes.
3. Combine remaining cup of flour, 1/3 cup brown sugar, 1/4 tsp salt, and 1/4 tsp nutmeg. Cut in the remaining 6 tbsp butter until crumbly. Stir in almonds. Chill.
4. On a lightly floured work surface, roll out chilled pie pastry to fit a 9-inch pie pan. Fit pastry into the pan. Trim and flute edges. Chill.
5. Heat oven to 475°F (245°C). Grate 1 tbsp lemon zest from the lemon and squeeze 3 tbsp lemon juice. Peel peaches and slice. Combine with remaining 2/3 cup brown sugar, 1/4 tsp nutmeg, lemon zest and juice, cornstarch, and almond extract.
6. Sprinkle bread crumbs over bottom of pie shell and fill with peach mixture. Sprinkle almond crumb mixture on top.
7. Bake for 15 minutes at 475°F (245°C). Reduce temperature to 350°F (175°C) and continue baking until top is browned and fruit juices are bubbling, about 50 to 55 minutes. Cool completely before cutting.
